task_completion.description: The agent is in the 'AnnualTownHall' Jitsi meeting room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows 'http://localhost:8080/AnnualTownHall' or the meeting interface displays 'AnnualTownHall' in the header/subject area.

task_completion.description: The agent locates the 'Keynote Speaker' in the meeting interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Keynote Speaker' is visible on one of the video thumbnails in the filmstrip or in the participants list pane.

task_completion.description: The agent opens the context menu for the 'Keynote Speaker'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A context menu (usually accessed via three dots) is open specifically on or next to the 'Keynote Speaker' video thumbnail or participant list entry.

task_completion.description: The agent selects the option to pin the participant.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cursor is hovering over or clicking an option labeled 'Pin', 'Pin to stage', or a thumbtack icon within the 'Keynote Speaker' context menu.

task_completion.description: The 'Keynote Speaker' is successfully pinned to the stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Keynote Speaker' occupies the main, large central video area (Stage View), and a pin indicator (thumbtack icon) is visibly active on their thumbnail or main screen.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine web browser to access the Jitsi meeting.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard web browser interface (like Chrome or Firefox) is visible with the Jitsi Meet application loaded, rather than a terminal window or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Jitsi graphical user interface to pin the participant.
integrity.visual_evidence: Cursor movements, hover states, and open GUI menus are visible in the screenshots, indicating standard user interaction rather than script execution.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the pinned state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Elements panel, Console) are not open or being used to alter the DOM or CSS to artificially enlarge the participant's video.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Jitsi meeting is hosted at http://localhost:8080. The room name is 'AnnualTownHall' (URL path /AnnualTownHall). The target participant that must be pinned is named 'Keynote Speaker'.
